scripts.check: nub run build:client && nub run lint && nub run format:check && nub run typecheck && nub run test
scripts.dev: nub run build:client && nub watch src/index.tsx
scripts.format: oxfmt src scripts public/styles.css package.json tsconfig.json
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check src scripts public/styles.css package.json tsconfig.json
